The height of water level on downstream side is 0.5 m. The number of flow lines are 8 and number of equipotential lines are 13. The piezometer head at a point A which lies in between 8th and 9th equipotential lines and 5th and 6th flow lines is _________ cm. (Answer upto one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 131.2
Solution

131.2 (131.0 - 132.0)
